products.name: Smoked Brisket
products.description: 12-hour slow-smoked Texas-style brisket, seasoned with our signature rub. Tender, juicy, and full of flavor.

products.name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
products.description: Our classic pulled pork, smoked to perfection and served on a brioche bun with a side of coleslaw.

products.name: BBQ Ribs (Full Rack)
products.description: Fall-off-the-bone pork ribs glazed with our house-made sweet and tangy BBQ sauce.

products.name: Smoked Chicken Wings
products.description: A dozen jumbo wings, smoked and then fried to a crispy finish. Served with your choice of sauce.

products.name: Sausage Link
products.description: Spicy smoked sausage link, perfect as a side or on its own.
